text:
The user wants an explanation of the core logic of some code for an external examination. However, I don't see any code provided in their message. They seem to be referring to "this code" but haven't actually shared any code with me yet.

I need to ask them to provide the code they want me to explain. Since they're preparing for an external examination, they likely want a detailed breakdown of the logic to understand how it works.

I should ask them to share the code they're referring to.
